metadata.title: Generate a MirrorOS analysis prompt for an audit agent that processes enterprise compliance data in Latin America, using a technical lens to resolve artifact type ambiguity and produce a governed, validated output.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a MirrorOS analysis prompt for an audit agent that processes enterprise compliance data in Latin America, using a technical lens to resolve artifact type ambiguity and produce a governed, validated output.
mission.success_definition: The generated prompt resolves artifact type ambiguity by inferring the correct type from context.; All validation gates pass before output is finalized.; The output contract includes a clear specification of the artifact type, depth tier, and runtime target.

in_scope.item: The prompt must handle messy input with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must include explicit validation gates and produce an SR8-compilable artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The generated prompt resolves artifact type ambiguity by inferring the correct type from context.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All validation gates pass before output is finalized.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: The output contract includes a clear specification of the artifact type, depth tier, and runtime target.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.analysis_subject: Generate a MirrorOS analysis prompt for an audit agent that processes enterprise compliance data in Latin America, using a technical lens to resolve artifact type ambiguity and produce a governed, validated output.

mirrors.item: The prompt must handle messy input with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must include explicit validation gates and produce an SR8-compilable artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections.

contradiction_checks.item: Input may contain contradictory or incomplete information.
Output must be strictly JSON with no markdown fences.
All sections must be present and non-empty.
Validation gates must check for completeness, consistency, and compliance with SR8 schema.

SRXML_Artifact.synthesis_contract: artifact_type: mirroros_analysis_prompt; depth_tier: D2_PRODUCTION; runtime_target: Codex; should_block: False; blocked_reason: None; compiled_intent: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: string; Success Criteria: string; Output Contract: object

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
